column1: If only I_____________start the day again, I'd do everything differently.
It takes such a long time to get there from Mars especially when the traffic is bad. _______________I_____________a faster spaceship.
Because I really wanted to look at the aliens in the Super Alien Zoo. Oh, I wish______________that.
Why am I so stupid? I_____________now that I'd never applied for the job in the first place,
I'm sure I won't get the job. I just____________tomorrow is better than today was.
